nodes.label: Native Equation
nodes.description: Paper-faithful master law selecting Ω_{t+1} by constrained minimization over drift, memory, continuity, and risk.

nodes.label: Canonical Symbolic Equation
nodes.description: Presentation-layer alias form using א, ת, Y, and R to compress the same native architecture into a more identity-rich law.

nodes.label: Ω_t
nodes.description: Unified OmegA system state at time t.

nodes.label: Ω_{t+1}
nodes.description: Unified OmegA system state at time t+1.

nodes.label: Φ_t
nodes.description: Phylactery HEAD: ratified identity state.

nodes.label: E_t
nodes.description: Run Envelope compiled by AEGIS.

nodes.label: τ_t
nodes.description: Task State Object managed by AEON.

nodes.label: B_t
nodes.description: Claim Budget for current generation pass.

nodes.label: S_t
nodes.description: Self-Tag continuity record written after task completion.

nodes.label: G_t
nodes.description: MYELIN memory graph.

nodes.label: 𝒞
nodes.description: Admissible successor-state set enforced by continuity, verifier, and consent gates.

nodes.label: κ_macro
nodes.description: Macro continuity gate for session initialization / identity continuity.

nodes.label: κ_micro
nodes.description: Micro continuity gate for task continuation.

nodes.label: V
nodes.description: Verifier score that must clear acceptance threshold.

nodes.label: τ_verify
nodes.description: Verifier acceptance threshold.

nodes.label: R(a)
nodes.description: Action-level governance risk used for consent gating.

nodes.label: τ_consent
nodes.description: Consent threshold for executable actions.

nodes.label: J_drift
nodes.description: ADCCL drift penalty covering structure, consistency, and unsupported claims.

nodes.label: L_memory
nodes.description: Memory loss / inverse retrievability utility term.

nodes.label: κ_continuity
nodes.description: Continuity score coupling macro and micro chains.

nodes.label: R_risk
nodes.description: System-level governance risk term from AEGIS.

nodes.label: α
nodes.description: Tradeoff weight that scales constructive side versus destructive side.

nodes.label: β
nodes.description: Weight on memory term in native objective.

nodes.label: γ
nodes.description: Weight on continuity term in native objective.

nodes.label: δ
nodes.description: Weight on risk term in native objective.

nodes.label: א_t
nodes.description: Presentation-layer alias for Ω_t.

nodes.label: א*_{t+1}
nodes.description: Presentation-layer alias for selected next state.

nodes.label: ת_t
nodes.description: Task-conditioned fulfillment class induced by Goal(τ_t, Φ_t, E_t).

nodes.label: Goal(τ_t, Φ_t, E_t)
nodes.description: Goal projection from task, identity, and run-envelope context.

nodes.label: Y
nodes.description: Constructive yield functional bundling memory utility, continuity, and progress toward fulfillment.

nodes.label: R
nodes.description: Destructive pressure functional bundling drift and governance risk.

nodes.label: ω
nodes.description: Internal tradeoff inside Y between continuity preservation and goal-directed progress.

nodes.label: D
nodes.description: Distance-to-fulfillment term between a candidate state and ת_t.

nodes.label: MYELIN
nodes.description: Memory substrate layer.

nodes.label: ADCCL
nodes.description: Cognitive control loop layer.

nodes.label: AEON
nodes.description: Cognitive operating system / runtime layer.

nodes.label: AEGIS
nodes.description: Governance shell layer.

edges.description: Native Equation selects Ω_{t+1} by optimizing over admissible successor states.
Native Equation evaluates objective terms relative to Ω_t.
Native Equation only ranges over states in 𝒞.
Native Equation includes J_drift as a penalty term.
Native Equation includes L_memory in its objective.
Native Equation subtracts κ_continuity as a beneficial continuity term.
Native Equation includes R_risk as a governance penalty.
Ω_t contains Φ_t as one of its six native state components.
Ω_t contains E_t as the active Run Envelope.
Ω_t contains τ_t as the active Task State Object.
Ω_t contains B_t as the active Claim Budget.
Ω_t contains S_t as the Self-Tag continuity record.
Ω_t contains G_t as the MYELIN memory graph.
𝒞 requires κ_macro to remain above its threshold.
𝒞 requires κ_micro to remain above its threshold.
𝒞 requires V to clear verification.
V must exceed τ_verify for acceptance.
𝒞 requires action-level risk R(a) to remain below the consent boundary.
R(a) must remain below τ_consent for execution to be allowed.
J_drift originates from ADCCL's anti-drift control logic.
L_memory reflects retrievability properties of the memory substrate.
κ_continuity depends on continuity mechanisms spanning runtime identity and task chains.
R_risk is the governance-risk term of the system.
Canonical Symbolic Equation is a presentation-layer refactor of Native Equation.
א_t is defined as an alias for Ω_t.
א*_{t+1} is the presentation-layer name for the selected successor state Ω_{t+1}.
ת_t is introduced as an alias for Goal(τ_t, Φ_t, E_t).
Goal(τ_t, Φ_t, E_t) depends on τ_t as the active task object.
Goal(τ_t, Φ_t, E_t) depends on Φ_t as the current ratified identity state.
Goal(τ_t, Φ_t, E_t) depends on E_t as the loaded run-envelope context.
Canonical Symbolic Equation uses א_t as its present-state symbol.
Canonical Symbolic Equation uses ת_t as its fulfillment-class symbol.
Canonical Symbolic Equation optimizes through Y as its constructive side.
Canonical Symbolic Equation penalizes through R as its destructive side.
Y includes the negative of L_memory as one of its ingredients.
Y includes κ_continuity as a positive ingredient.
Y includes D(Ω', ת_t) as a goal-distance penalty.
Y uses ω to split emphasis between continuity and goal-directed progress.
R bundles J_drift as one of its destructive ingredients.
R bundles R_risk as one of its destructive ingredients.
Canonical Symbolic Equation ranges only over admissible states in 𝒞.
Native Equation uses α as one of its objective weights.
Native Equation uses β as the coefficient on L_memory.
Native Equation uses γ as the coefficient on κ_continuity.
Native Equation uses δ as the coefficient on R_risk.
